title: rosa rubiginosa subvar. schulzei
intro: Rosa rubiginosa subvar. schulzei, commonly known as the fragrant or downy rose, is a subspecies of the fragrant rose plant. It is a flowering plant that has been used for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The leaves and flowers of this plant are rich in antioxidants and have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and promote healthy skin, with health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Rosa rubiginosa subvar. schulzei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
